input: Fotokozani za tsiku Padziko Lapansi pomwe mphamvu yokoka imabwerera mwadzidzidzi kwa maola angapo. Kodi anthu ndi nyama zimatani?
Pangani munthu yemwe kale anali ngwazi koma wakhala woipa chifukwa cha kusamvetsetsana koopsa.
Lembani za munthu yemwe ali womaliza mwa mtundu wawo kukhala m'dziko lomwe lapita popanda iwo.
Pangani munthu yemwe mthunzi wake wakhalapo ndikukhala ngati mnzake woyipa.

Lembani imelo kuti mufufuze pa kuyankhulana kwa ntchito komwe mudakhalako masabata awiri apitawo. Onetsani chidwi chanu chopitilira paudindowu, zikomo wofunsayo chifukwa cha nthawi yawo, ndikupempha zosintha.
Muyenera kukonzekera msonkhano ndi mnzanu kuti mukambirane momwe polojekiti ikuyendera. Lembani imelo yaulemu yopempha nthawi yoyenera ya msonkhano ndi kupereka autilaini mwachidule.
Lembani imelo kwa woyang'anira wanu kuti akuuzeni za lipoti laposachedwa lomwe mwatumiza. Onetsani chidwi chanu pakuwongolera ntchito yanu ndikufunsani malingaliro ena.
Lembani imelo kwa manejala wanu kupepesa chifukwa chosowa tsiku lomaliza la polojekiti. Fotokozani chifukwa chakuchedwerako, ndipo fotokozani zomwe mwachita kuti zitsimikizire kuti sizichitikanso.
Lembani imelo kwa wogulitsa amene wapereka zinthu zolakwika kapena zowonongeka. Fotokozani nkhaniyi mwaulemu, perekani zambiri, ndikupempha kuti mubwezedwe kapena kubweza m'malo.
Lembani imelo kwa woimira kasitomala wofunsa za kupezeka ndi kutsimikizika kwa chinthu chomwe mukufuna kugula.
Mwaona mtengo wolakwika pa bilu yanu ya pamwezi. Lembani imelo ku dipatimenti yobwereketsa kufotokoza za nkhaniyi ndikupempha kukonza.
Lembani imelo kwa kasitomala wofunika wowathokoza chifukwa cha bizinesi yawo yomwe akupitilira, ndikuwadziwitsa za kukwezedwa kwapadera kapena kutsatsa.
Lembani imelo ku dipatimenti yothandizira makasitomala a kampani kuti muthetse vuto lomwe munakumana nalo ndi ntchito yawo. Fotokozani vuto ndikuwonetsa momwe mungafune kuti lithetsedwe.
Lembani imelo yopempha kubwezeredwa kapena kusinthana ndi chinthu chomwe munagula pa intaneti. Phatikizani nambala yanu yoyitanitsa ndi chifukwa chobwezera.
Lembani imelo kwa mnzanu amene simunalankhule naye kwakanthawi. Adziwitseni zomwe zakhala zikuchitika m'moyo wanu ndikuwafunsa momwe alili.
Lembani imelo yothokoza wachibale kapena mnzanu chifukwa cha mphatso yomwe adakupatsani. Nenani mosapita m’mbali chifukwa chake mumayamikira mphatsoyo komanso mmene mukufuna kuigwiritsa ntchito.
Lembani imelo yoitanira anzanu kuphwando lomwe mukuchititsa. Phatikizani zambiri za tsiku, nthawi, malo, ndi zochitika zilizonse zapadera.
Lembani imelo yothokoza mnzanu kapena mnzanu pazomwe mwachita posachedwa. Fotokozerani chisangalalo chanu kwa iwo ndipo perekani mawu olimbikitsa.
Lembani imelo kwa mnzanu wapamtima kapena wachibale kugawana nkhani zosangalatsa. Auzeni mwatsatanetsatane komanso momwe mukumvera.
Lembani imelo ku ofesi yovomerezeka ya yunivesite kufunsa zambiri za pulogalamu inayake. Funsani za njira yofunsira, masiku omaliza, ndi zina.
Lembani imelo kwa pulofesa wakale wowapempha kuti akulembereni kalata yoyamikira. Perekani zambiri za udindowo ndikudzipereka kuti mupereke zambiri.
Lembani imelo yovomerezeka kwa wogwira ntchito m'boma kuti afotokoze nkhani yomwe ikukukhudzani. Nenani nkhawa zanu, perekani mfundo zochirikiza, ndikupereka mayankho otheka.
Mwangoyamba kumene ntchito yatsopano ndipo mukufuna kudzidziwitsa nokha kwa mamembala a gulu lanu. Lembani imelo yodzidziwitsa nokha ndikuwonetsa chisangalalo chanu chogwira ntchito limodzi.
Lembani imelo kwa olemba ntchito omwe kale akufunsa kuti awagwiritse ntchito ngati chidziwitso cha ntchito yatsopano. Mwaulemu pemphani chilolezo chawo ndikuwathokoza chifukwa cha thandizo lawo.
Lembani imelo yozizira kwa omwe angakhale kasitomala akudziwitsani kampani yanu ndikupereka ntchito zanu. Onetsani mphamvu zanu zazikulu ndikufotokozera momwe mungathandizire bizinesi yawo.
Lembani imelo yotsatsa yolengeza kukhazikitsidwa kwa chinthu chatsopano. Phatikizani zambiri za zomwe zagulitsidwa, maubwino, ndi zokwezera zapadera zilizonse kapena kuchotsera.
Lembani imelo yotsatila kwa omwe angakhale kasitomala amene wasonyeza chidwi ndi malonda anu. Akumbutseni za ubwino wake ndipo perekani kuyankha mafunso aliwonse.
Lembani imelo yotsimikizira wolembetsa watsopano ku nyuzipepala yakampani yanu. Athokozeni chifukwa cholembetsa, auzeni zomwe angayembekezere, ndikuyitanitsa kuti achitepo kanthu.
Lembani imelo yogulitsa kwa makasitomala omwe alipo omwe akupereka zokhudzana ndi zomwe angakonde kutengera zomwe anagula kale. Onetsani chifukwa chake zinthuzi zimayenderana ndi kugula kwawo.
Lembani imelo kwa pulofesa wanu wopempha kuti awonjezere ntchito. Fotokozani zomwe zikuchitika ndipo perekani nthawi yoyenera yoti mutsirize ntchitoyo.
Lembani imelo kwa anzanu akusukulu omwe akugwirizanitsa ntchito yamagulu. Perekani ntchito, khalani ndi nthawi yomaliza, ndipo perekani nthawi yokumana kuti mukambirane momwe zikuyendera.
Lembani imelo kwa pulofesa wofunsa za mwayi wofufuza. Onetsani zokonda zanu ndikufotokozera chifukwa chake mukufuna kugwira nawo ntchito.
Lembani imelo kwa pulofesa wanu kupepesa chifukwa chosowa kalasi chifukwa cha zochitika zosayembekezereka. Funsani ngati pali chilichonse chomwe mukufuna kuti muthe kuchipeza.
Lembani imelo kwa pulofesa wakale kapena mlangizi wopempha uphungu wa ntchito. Fotokozani mwachidule mmene zinthu zilili panopa ndipo funsani malangizo a mmene mungapitirire patsogolo.

Ena amakhulupirira kuti kuphunzira pa intaneti ndikothandiza kwambiri kuposa kuphunzira kwachikhalidwe, pomwe ena amati kuphunzira m'kalasi ndikofunikira. Kambiranani maganizo onse awiri ndikupereka maganizo anu.

Anthu ena amakhulupirira kuti mavuto azachilengedwe ayenera kuthetsedwa padziko lonse lapansi, pomwe ena amaganiza kuti akuyenera kuthetsedwa kwanuko. Kambiranani maganizo onse awiri ndikupereka maganizo anu.
Ena amakhulupirira kuti kukhala ndi moyo wabwino pantchito ndizovuta kwambiri masiku ano kuposa kale. Kodi mumavomereza kapena kusagwirizana ndi mawuwa mpaka pati?
M’mayiko ambiri, anthu akulemera kwambiri, pamene thanzi lawo ndi olimba zikucheperachepera. Zomwe zimayambitsa komanso njira zothetsera vutoli ndi ziti?
Ena amanena kuti kuyezetsa nyama pa kafukufuku wamankhwala ndikofunikira, pomwe ena amakhulupirira kuti kuyenera kuletsedwa. Kambiranani maganizo onse awiri ndikupereka maganizo anu.
M’mayiko ambiri, achinyamata amavutika kuti apeze ntchito. Kodi zifukwa za nkhaniyi ndi chiyani, ndipo mungayankhe bwanji?
Kunenepa kwambiri kukukulirakulira m’maiko ambiri. Kodi zifukwa za nkhaniyi ndi chiyani, ndipo ndi njira ziti zomwe zingatsatidwe kuti zithetse vutoli?
M’mizinda ikuluikulu yambiri, kuipitsidwa kwa mpweya ndi madzi ndi nkhani yaikulu. Kodi zimayambitsa mavutowa ndi chiyani, ndipo ndi njira ziti zomwe zingachitidwe kuti zinthu ziyende bwino?
Akuluakulu ambiri alibe luso lofunikira pakompyuta masiku ano. Kodi zifukwa zomwe zapangitsa izi ndi ziti, ndipo tingatani kuti luso la digito liziyenda bwino?
M’matauni ambiri, kusowa pokhala kukuwonjezereka. Kodi zifukwa za kuwonjezeka kumeneku n’ziti, ndipo n’chiyani chingachitidwe kuti vutoli lichepe?
Kusintha kwanyengo kukukhudza kwambiri dziko lathu lapansi. Kodi mukuganiza kuti zomwe zimayambitsa kusintha kwa nyengo ndi chiyani, ndipo zotsatira zake zingakhale zotani pa chilengedwe?
Kugula pa intaneti kwatchuka kwambiri m'zaka zaposachedwa. Kodi zifukwa zamtunduwu ndi zotani, ndipo zimakhudza bwanji mabizinesi amderalo?
M’madera ambiri padziko lapansi, chiwerengero cha anthu amene amawerenga mabuku chatsika kwambiri. Kodi zifukwa za kuchepa kumeneku n’zotani, ndipo zotsatira zake n’zotani kwa anthu?
Kuchulukitsitsa kwa anthu kukudetsa nkhaŵa kwambiri m’mizinda yambiri. Kodi nchiyani chimene chimayambitsa kuchulukana kwa anthu, ndipo ndi zotulukapo zotani pa moyo wa m’tauni?
Kudalirana kwa mayiko kwabweretsa mapindu ambiri, komanso kuwononga mbali zina za anthu. Kodi kudalirana kwa mayiko kumayambitsa chiyani, ndipo kwakhudza bwanji dziko?
M’zaka zaposachedwapa, ntchito zakutali zafala kwambiri. Kambiranani ubwino ndi kuipa kwa ntchito yakutali.
Anthu ambiri akuchoka kumidzi kupita kumizinda. Kambiranani ubwino ndi kuipa kwa mchitidwewu.
Kupita patsogolo kwaukadaulo kwasintha momwe anthu amalankhulirana. Kodi ubwino ndi kuipa kwa chitukukochi ndi chiyani?
Mizinda yambiri ikuika ndalama m’njira zoyendetsera zoyendera za anthu onse pofuna kuchepetsa kuchulukana kwa magalimoto. Kambiranani ubwino ndi kuipa kwa ndalamazi.
Kupezeka kwa maulendo apadziko lonse kwawonjezeka kwambiri. Kambiranani ubwino ndi kuipa kwa alendo ndi mayiko omwe abwera nawo.
M'mayiko ena, maudindo a amuna ndi akazi akusintha, pamene m'mayiko ena, maudindo amapitirizabe. Kodi mukuvomereza kuti maudindo a jenda akusintha? Kodi izi zikukhudza bwanji anthu?
Ena amakhulupirira kuti makolo ayenera kukhala ndi udindo wolera ana, pamene ena amaganiza kuti boma liyenera kuchitapo kanthu. Kambiranani maganizo onse awiri ndikupereka maganizo anu.
Ena amakhulupirira kuti malo ochezera a pa Intaneti ali ndi chikoka chabwino pa anthu, pamene ena amaganiza kuti ali ndi zotsatira zoipa. Kambiranani maganizo onse awiri ndikupereka maganizo anu.
Kudalirana kwa mayiko kumapangitsa kuti chikhalidwe chiwonongeke. Kodi mumavomereza kapena mukutsutsa pati? Kodi ndi zinthu ziti zomwe zingatsatidwe pofuna kuteteza zikhalidwe zakumaloko?
Ena amakhulupirira kuti luso ndi gawo lofunika kwambiri la anthu, pamene ena amaganiza kuti ndi chinthu chapamwamba. Kambiranani maganizo onse awiri ndikupereka maganizo anu.
Fotokozani chizolowezi cham'mawa chamtsogolo pomwe chilichonse chimangochitika zokha komanso chokongoletsedwa kuti chikhale chopambana. Kodi ndi zovuta zotani zomwe zimabuka?
Tangoganizani kuti muli ndi mphamvu zopambana zomwe zimakulolani kuti muyime nthawi kwa mphindi 10 ola lililonse. Kodi mumaphatikizira bwanji izi pazochitika zanu zatsiku ndi tsiku?
Lembani za tsiku m'moyo wa munthu wokonzedwa bwino yemwe amakonzekera mphindi iliyonse ya tsiku lawo. Kodi chimachitika ndi chiyani zinthu zikayamba kutha?
Khazikitsani mndandanda wazopanga komanso wachilendo wosintha ntchito zapakhomo kukhala masewera. Kodi malamulowo ndi ati, ndipo amakulimbikitsani bwanji?
Pangani nkhani ya munthu amene akufuna kusiya chizolowezi choipa (monga kuzengereza kapena kudya kwambiri) pogwiritsa ntchito njira zosazolowereka kapena zamatsenga.
Tangoganizani ofesi yomwe wogwira ntchito aliyense akuyimira malingaliro osiyana (monga chisangalalo, mkwiyo, kaduka). Kodi amayendetsa bwanji ntchito za tsiku ndi tsiku ndi misonkhano?
Fotokozani ntchito yakutali, koma m'malo mogwira ntchito kunyumba, wojambulayo akugwira ntchito kuchokera kumadera osiyanasiyana osangalatsa (monga zisumbu zoyandama kapena nkhalango zolodzedwa).

Muofesi yamatsenga, antchito amagwiritsa ntchito potions kuti awonjezere zokolola zawo pa ntchito zosiyanasiyana. Kodi chimachitika ndi chiyani ngati wina atenga mankhwala olakwika pa ntchito yolakwika?

Pulogalamu yatsopano imati imatengera 'tsiku lantchito labwino' kutengera zomwe munthu amakonda komanso zomwe amakonda. Lembani za munthu amene amayesa, koma ndikupeza kuti ndizovuta kwambiri kuposa momwe amayembekezera.
Tangoganizani kukhala m’nyumba yomwe ingathe kudziyeretsa yokha koma ili ndi ‘malingaliro’ akeake pa mmene ukhondo uyenera kuonekera. Kodi pamakhala mavuto otani?
Fotokozani za kachitidwe kantchito komwe ntchito iliyonse yapakhomo imasinthidwa kukhala masewera ang'onoang'ono, okhala ndi milingo, mphotho, ndi zovuta zosayembekezereka.
Lembani za nyumba yomwe zida zonse zimatha kukambirana. Aliyense ali ndi umunthu wosiyana ndipo amapereka malangizo (kapena madandaulo) pamene mukuchita ntchito zanu za tsiku ndi tsiku.
Yambitsani chizolowezi choyeretsa tsiku ndi tsiku m'dziko lomwe tsiku lililonse limabweretsa zopinga zina zamatsenga, monga fumbi lolozeredwa kapena zida zotsukira zolakwika.
Nthawi zonse mukachapa, sock imasowa, koma m'malo mozimiririka, imadutsa nthawi. Lembani za zomwe zatulukira.
Fitness tracker yanu imayamba kukupatsani upangiri wamunthu, pafupifupi wama psychic. Kodi zimasintha bwanji chizolowezi chanu, ndipo zolinga zake zobisika ndi zotani?
Tangoganizani kuti nthawi iliyonse mukamachita masewera olimbitsa thupi, mumatengedwa kupita kumalo ena komwe mphamvu zanu zimakhudza dziko lozungulira inu. Fotokozani gawo limodzi lolimbitsa thupi.
Lembani za munthu amene amapanga mgwirizano ndi munthu wamatsenga kuti azitsatira zolinga zake zaumoyo. Tsiku lililonse akadumpha ntchito, amakumana ndi zotulukapo zosasangalatsa.
Pangani nkhani yomwe kukonzekera chakudya chatsiku ndi tsiku kumakhala kosangalatsa - chilichonse chimachokera kudziko lamatsenga ndipo chimafunika kuchitidwa mwapadera.
Tangoganizani kalasi ya yoga yomwe imachitika mu situdiyo yosangalatsa momwe mphamvu yokoka imasinthira, kupindika kwa nthawi, ndi mawonekedwe amatsenga.
Fotokozani za ulendo watsiku ndi tsiku mumzinda wongopeka wodzaza ndi zamatsenga, momwe zoyendera za anthu onse zimakhala ndi ngolo zamatsenga, zowuluka, kapena madoko.
Nthawi zonse mukakwera basi kupita kuntchito, mumakumana ndi mtundu wosiyana waulendo womwewo m'chilengedwe chofananira. Ndi machitidwe kapena kusintha kotani komwe mumayamba kuwona?
Teleportation ndiye njira yodziwika bwino yamayendedwe, koma vuto limapangitsa okwera kukakamira kwakanthawi pakati pa malo. Fotokozani mmene anthu amachitira ndi vuto la tsiku ndi tsiku limeneli.
Tangoganizirani malo ogulitsira am'tsogolo momwe maloboti oyendetsedwa ndi AI amathandizira ogula, koma ali ndi malingaliro awoawo. Kodi izi zimakhudza bwanji kugula?
Lembani za zochitika pamsika pomwe ogulitsa amagulitsa zinthu wamba komanso zamatsenga, ndipo kugulitsana sikufuna ndalama zokha, koma zidule zanzeru kapena miyambi.
Sinthani tsiku losavuta lochita zinthu zina kukhala chofuna, ndikuyimitsa kulikonse kumabweretsa zovuta zapadera (mwachitsanzo, kubweza zosakaniza zomwe zikusowa, kuthetsa ma puzzles, ndi zina).
Muli ndi ntchito yogula zinthu mosadziwika bwino, koma masitolo omwe mumatumizidwako ndiachilendo - iliyonse ili ndi chinsinsi chomwe chiyenera kuwululidwa.
Mumapatsidwa mndandanda wa golosale wokhala ndi zinthu zomwe zikuwoneka kuti palibe. Pamene mukufufuza, mumapeza kuti chinthu chilichonse ndi chidziwitso chotsogolera ku chinthu china chachikulu.
M'dziko laukadaulo wapamwamba momwe kupumula kumakongoletsedwa mwasayansi, fotokozani zomwe munthu amachita usiku wonse pogwiritsa ntchito zida ndi njira zamtsogolo.
M'dziko limene maloto amatha kulamuliridwa mwa kutsatira ndondomeko yeniyeni, fotokozani kukonzekera kwa munthu kaamba ka maloto awo angwiro.
Lembani za munthu amene amasinkhasinkha m'malo osazolowereka (monga, pamwamba pansanja, pansi pa nyanja, m'nkhalango yowirira) kuti adzikhazikike pambuyo pa tsiku lalitali.
Fotokozani madzulo achizolowezi omwe mumakhala ndi chiweto chamatsenga chomwe chimatha kusintha mawonekedwe ake kuti agwirizane ndi momwe mwiniwake akumvera.
Yambitsani njira yapadera yolembera nyuzipepala yowunikira zomwe zachitika tsikulo, pogwiritsa ntchito malangizo omwe amayang'ana pa mphindi zazing'ono zothokoza, zaluso, kapena kudzidziwitsa nokha.
Fotokozani za munthu yemwe sangafe koma amamva kuwawa kulikonse chifukwa chavulala. Kodi amatani ndi kukhalapo kumeneku?
Tangoganizirani munthu yemwe ali ndi chiweto cha robotic chokhala ndi AI yapamwamba yomwe imayamba kukulitsa umunthu wake ndi zokhumba zake.
Kuchitika msonkhano pakati pa mitundu yosiyanasiyana yachilendo kuti apange mgwirizano wamtendere wapadziko lonse. Kodi amathetsa bwanji zilankhulo ndi zikhalidwe?
Lembani za pulaneti limene linapangidwa ndi zamoyo zotsogola koma lasiyidwa. Kodi anthu a m'dzikoli apeza chiyani za cholinga chake chenicheni?
M'dziko limene kukumbukira kumatha kubedwa, fotokozani moyo wa wakuba kukumbukira yemwe amayamba kutaya chidziwitso chawo.
Gulu la ofufuza apanga luso lodumpha pakati pa miyeso, koma gawo lililonse ndi lowopsa kwambiri kuposa lomaliza. Nchiyani chimawapangitsa iwo kupitiriza?
M'tsogolomu, danga ladzala ndi zinyalala za anthu oyenda m'mlengalenga omwe anaiwalika kalekale. Fotokozani za moyo wa mkazankho pakati pa mabwinja amenewa.
Khomo lodabwitsa likuwonekera m'nkhalango yopita kumalo a fae. Kodi oyenda oyamba amapeza chiyani kutsidya lina?
Zinjoka zatha kalekale, koma imodzi imabadwanso m’thupi la munthu. Kodi zimenezi zimakhudza bwanji dziko lamatsenga?
Lembani za munthu amene mosadziŵa amasaina mgwirizano ndi wamatsenga wamphamvu ndipo tsopano ayenera kukwaniritsa ntchito yomwe siingatheke.
Longosolani mzinda umene nyumba iliyonse ndi msewu uli ndi moyo, ndi malingaliro ake ndi malingaliro ake. Kodi anthu okhalamo amakhala bwanji ndi nyumba zawo?
output: What do they think of their homes?

input: Kalonga kapena mwana wamkazi watembereredwa kusandulika chirombo usiku uliwonse. Ayenera kupeza njira yochotsera tembererolo lisanawawononge.
Munthu amayamba kukumana ndi zoopsa m'moyo weniweni. Nthawi zonse akadzuka, gawo lina la dziko loopsya limawatsatira kukhala zenizeni.
Lembani zaukadaulo (foni, laputopu, ndi zina zotero) zomwe zimavutitsidwa ndi gulu loyipa. Kodi chimayendetsa bwanji mwiniwake?
M'tawuni yaying'ono, dzuwa limasowa mwadzidzidzi ndipo nthawi zonse kumakhala pakati pausiku. Palibe amene angachoke m’tauniyo, ndipo zolengedwa zachilendo zinayamba kutuluka mumdima.
Gulu la abwenzi linakumana ndi buku lakale lomwe limafotokoza mwambo woitanira mulungu woiwalika. Amazichita ngati nthabwala-mpaka zitagwira ntchito.
Wopanga zidole amapanga zidole zonga zamoyo, koma zitasowa modabwitsa, zidolezo zimayamba kuchita ngati zili zamoyo, chilichonse ndi zolinga zoipa.
Gulu la ofufuza limapeza chitukuko chobisika chomwe sichinakhudzidwe ndi dziko lakunja kwa zaka mazana ambiri. Kodi amayanjana bwanji ndi gululi?
Longosolani ulendo wopita kumunsi kwenikweni kwa nyanja, kumene anapeza chinachake chosayembekezereka—mzinda wamakedzana wotetezedwa ndi zolengedwa zosadziwika.
M'chipululu chodzaza ndi mvula yamkuntho yoopsa ndi zolengedwa zobisika, othamanga amapikisana pa mpikisano wapachaka kuti alandire mphotho yosowa.
Ogwira ntchito amasokonekera pachilumba chodabwitsa chomwe chimasinthasintha mawonekedwe ake ndikubisa zinsinsi zakale.
Gulu la zigawenga zakuthambo limayenda m'ndege kudutsa zilumba zoyandama ndi mizinda yakuthambo kufunafuna chuma chodziwika bwino chobisika m'mitambo.
Wapolisi wofufuza milandu amadzuka osakumbukira maola 48 apitawa, koma adapeza kuti ndi omwe akuwakayikira pamlandu waukulu. Kodi amaonetsa bwanji kuti alibe mlandu?
Hotelo imawoneka modabwitsa m'malo osiyanasiyana padziko lonse lapansi, koma usiku wokha. Kukangocha, zimasowa. Chinsinsi chake ndi chiyani?
M'malo owonetsera zojambulajambula otchuka, zojambulazo zimayamba kunong'oneza zinsinsi za anthu omwe amaziwona. Kodi chodabwitsa chimenechi chachititsa chiyani?
Lembani za tawuni yomwe, mmodzimmodzi, anthu akusoweka popanda kuwonekera. Amene atsala sakumbukira osoweka.
Mlendo wovala chigoba amangowonekera m'malo osiyanasiyana ophwanya malamulo koma sakuwoneka kuti sakugwirizana ndi zachiwawazo. Kodi iwo ndani, ndipo akudziwa chiyani?
Tangoganizani mbiri ina pomwe Leonardo da Vinci adamaliza makina ogwiritsira ntchito nthawi. Kodi chingachitike n’chiyani ngati atapezeka masiku ano?
Lembani za mtolankhani yemwe akulemba zochitika zazikulu za mbiri yakale amene mwangozi amasintha zotsatira zake ndi lipoti limodzi.
Fotokozani nkhani ya gulu lotsutsa panthaŵi ya ulamuliro wopondereza m’mbiri, ndi mavuto amakhalidwe abwino amene amakumana nawo kuti apulumuke.
Pangani cholembera cha m'magazini kuchokera kwa wofufuza mbiri wotchuka yemwe amakumana ndi dziko lomwe kulibe mapu aliwonse.
Ufumu womwe umaganiziridwa kuti watayika m'mbiri yakale umapezekanso, koma anthu ake sanakalamba kwazaka zambiri. Kodi chinawachitikira n’chiyani?

Posachedwapa, chidziwitso chikhoza kusamutsidwa ku matupi osiyanasiyana. Kodi chimachitika ndi chiyani munthu akasamutsira ku thupi lochita kupanga ndipo akufuna kubwerera ku mawonekedwe ake oyambirira?
Lembani nkhani ya anthu amene makina amatsimikizira kuti munthu ali ndi makhalidwe abwino. Kodi chimachitika ndi chiyani ngati munthu amene ali ndi makhalidwe oipa akutsutsa dongosolo?
Gulu la asayansi limapeza kuti maloto ndi chithunzithunzi cha zinthu zofanana. Kodi izi zikusintha bwanji kamvedwe kathu ka maganizo?
Pambuyo pa imfa, miyoyo imaweruzidwa malinga ndi zikumbukiro za kukoma mtima zomwe adazisiya. Munthu amazindikira kuti ndalama zikutha.
M'tsogolomu molamulidwa ndi AI, chisankho chomaliza chomwe anthu amaloledwa kupanga ndicho kukumbukira komwe akufuna kusunga kwamuyaya.
Lembani nkhani ya gulu la ngwazi zapamwamba zomwe zapuma pantchito zomwe zachoka pantchito yomaliza.
Fotokozani zochitika za munthu wapaulendo yemwe mwangozi adakakamira mumlengalenga wofanana momwe zochitika zakale zasintha kwambiri.
Tangolingalirani za ufumu umene maganizo amalamulira nyengo. Fotokozani tsiku m'moyo wa nzika yomwe imakhala kumeneko.
Pangani nkhani yozungulira chinthu chakale chomwe, chikakhudza, chimawonetsa mwiniwake chithunzithunzi cha tsogolo lawo, koma kwa masekondi 10 okha.
Lembani nkhani yaifupi kuchokera mumalingaliro a chombo cham'mlengalenga chomwe chimalakalaka kukhala ndi anzawo koma chomwe chili papulaneti lopanda anthu.
Lembani zokambirana pakati pa wapolisi wofufuza milandu ndi katswiri wodziwa zigawenga omwe ali mabwenzi mobisa aubwana.
Pangani zokambirana pakati pa wamlengalenga ndi mlendo yemwe amalumikizana pogwiritsa ntchito mitundu m'malo mwa mawu.
Lembani zokambirana pakati pa munthu wamoyo ndi mzukwa amene amapereka uphungu wa moyo mosayembekezereka.
Pangani zokambirana pakati pa AI ndi mlengi wake, pomwe AI imakayikira cholinga cha kukhalapo kwake.
Lembani zokambirana pakati pa akuluakulu awiri omwe akufuna kugonjetsa mfumu yokondedwa, koma mokhota kuti mmodzi wa iwo ali ndi zolinga zobisika.
Tangoganizani za mzinda wapansi panthaka womwe ukuyendetsedwa ndi zomera zopangira bioluminescent. Kodi anthu a m’dzikoli amakumana ndi mavuto otani?
Ganizirani za gulu lomwe matsenga ndi ukadaulo zikuphatikizidwa mosadukiza. Kodi anthu amagwiritsa ntchito bwanji mphamvu zimenezi pa moyo wawo watsiku ndi tsiku?
Pangani dziko lomwe gwero lokha lamadzi ndi malo odabwitsa omwe amayenda mwezi uliwonse, zomwe zimatsogolera kusamuka kosalekeza kwa onse okhalamo.
Fotokozani dziko la pambuyo pa apocalyptic lomwe ladzimanganso kukhala utopia, koma ndi zinsinsi zomwe zimawopseza mtendere wake.
Lembani ndakatulo pamene nyengo iliyonse imatchulidwa munthu ndipo amakambirana za kayendedwe ka moyo.
Pangani mndandanda wa haikus yomwe iliyonse imayimira kukumbukira pang'ono kwa chikondi choyiwalika.
Lembani ndakatulo yomwe imatengera owerenga kupyola mu mndandanda wa surreal dreamscapes, kusakaniza zenizeni ndi malingaliro.
Lembani ndakatulo yomwe imagwira kaimbidwe ndi kamvekedwe ka mzinda womwe mukuyenda mozungulira ngati nyimbo ya symphony.
Tangoganizani chilengedwe chikuyimba nyimbo yoyimba pansi usiku usanakwane. Ndi mawu otani ndi zithunzi zomwe zidzagwiritse ntchito?
Bwanji ngati mitundu yonse ya padziko lapansi itayamba kutha imodzi ndi imodzi? Fotokozani zomwe zimachitika pakatsala mtundu umodzi wokha.
Pangani nkhani yokhudza laibulale yomwe ili ndi buku lililonse lomwe linalembedwapo komanso buku lililonse lomwe lingalembedwe.
Tangoganizani za dziko limene kutengeka maganizo ndi kugulitsidwa. Kodi izi zingasinthe bwanji mayanjano a anthu ndi anthu?
Bwanji ngati anthu atayamba kukalamba mobwerera m’mbuyo, akucheperachepera pamene akukhala ndi moyo wautali? Kodi izi zingakhudze bwanji maubwenzi awo ndi lingaliro la nthawi?
